race.comment: SPARKLING SEA (13) cops a tough draw wide on the back row but she is classy. Beat older rivals when off a let-up at Menangle last start and has trialled since so should have come on. Suited back against the fillies and is good enough to overcome the barrier. RIPPLES NZ (5) hasn't had much go her way from the back row of late but was terrific in coming from a wide barrier to place in the NSW Oaks three back. Beat SPARKLING SEA home there and draws better than that rival so her best form can take her close. ALWAYSBJOY NZ (6) had a tough draw in the Redcliffe Oaks last start but she beat a couple of handy male rivals here prior, taking her record at this venue to five from seven. Worth another chance. STRIPES (10) may need some luck from the back row but only missed by a head in the Redcliffe Oaks last start. PERFECTDELIGHT (4) broke last start but won from wider than this at Menangle prior. Has a good draw so just needs her manners.

Live1.SchedulerNote: *P1 Ladbrokes QLD Constellations Carnival - Prize Money: $26,000
